## Technical Skills & Certifications

* **Design & UX:** UX Writing, User-Centered Design, Figma, Adobe Creative Suite (Expert), Brand Management.
* **MarTech & Data:** AI Implementation in Business, Google Analytics (Certified), SEO/SEM, SQL, CRM (HubSpot), JIRA (Agile Scrum).
* **Business:** Strategic Planning, Market Analysis, Project Management, Sales Funnel Engineering.
* **Languages:** English (Fluent), Spanish (Native).
